name: Integration reliability distinct from model quality
description: Participants distinguished between model-level quality failures and system integration failures — latency, provider availability, and cost — arguing that these require separate monitoring instrumentation.
key_evidence: Provider dependency risk: single-provider outages caused complete product unavailability (INT-01, INT-05, INT-07)
Latency SLA breaches occur independently of model output quality (INT-04, INT-10, INT-11)
Cost-quality decoupling: moving to premium models increases cost without measurable quality gain (INT-05, INT-06, INT-12)
significance_for_qalis: Motivates IQ dimension (IQ-1 through IQ-4). Participants in software tooling sector most vocal about latency SLA (INT-05, INT-11).
representative_quotes: [Anonymised quote from a participant whose excerpt was coded C17]
